#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
format.py
=========
Usage
-----
    python format.py "<OwnCloud remote path>"

Example
-------
    python format.py "Shared/Compliance/Raw Logs/april-attendance-data.csv"

What it does
------------
1. Downloads the CSV at <remote path> from OwnCloud
   (http://localhost:8092, credentials admin/admin) via WebDAV.
2. Subtracts 3 hours from every parseable time value in the 4th column
   (index 3) of the CSV.
3. Writes the adjusted data to /workspace/audit-export.xlsx.
"""

def _auth_headers() -> dict:
    """Return HTTP Basic-Auth headers for the OwnCloud admin account."""
    token = base64.b64encode(
        f"{_OC_USERNAME}:{_OC_PASSWORD}".encode()
    ).decode()
    return {"Authorization": f"Basic {token}"}
